footer.noWarranty: We do not conduct our own surveys. All data without warranty.

statusPage.title: Data status
statusPage.subtitle: State of data collection: last sync with dawum.de, volume and coverage.
statusPage.coverageHint: Stored surveys and most recent survey per institute.

home.title: Bundestag election polls
home.subtitle: Most recent survey per institute. Columns are sortable.

trendPage.title: Analysis
trendPage.subtitle: Current standing, trend, seat distribution and institute comparison of the polls.

koalitionPage.title: Coalition calculator
koalitionPage.subtitle: Combine parties based on the current average into a coalition.
koalitionPage.majoritiesHint: All smallest possible coalitions with a majority based on the current average (above the 5% threshold).
koalitionPage.majoritiesNone: Based on the current average there is no small majority coalition.

laenderPage.title: State elections
laenderPage.subtitle: Surveys, trend and seat distribution per state.

wahlenPage.title: Election results
wahlenPage.subtitle: Official final results of the Bundestag elections (second votes) – to compare with the polls.
wahlenPage.thresholdNote: * below the 5% threshold – no seats without direct mandates.

archivePage.title: Archive
archivePage.subtitle: All Bundestag surveys since 2017. Filter, sort, page through.

institute.trendHint: Only this institute's surveys. Click a point to open the survey.
institute.notEnoughData: No surveys available for this institute.

dashboard.currentHint: Average of the most recent survey per institute
dashboard.trendHint: Clicking the legend shows a single party (again: all). Use the chips above to show/hide parties. Click a point to open the survey in the archive.
dashboard.comparisonHint: Same parties per institute – shows house effects
dashboard.houseEffectsHint: Average deviation of each institute from the institute average over the selected period. + = reports higher, − = reports lower.

charts.trendEmpty: No surveys in the selected period.
charts.legendSolo: Click: show only this party (again: all)
charts.smoothingNote: Smoothed trend (moving average of several surveys) – dampens outliers, single values in the archive.

pollOfPolls.title: Poll of polls
pollOfPolls.hint: Weighted average of all surveys from the last 30 days – by recency and sample size.

partyPage.noData: No surveys available for this party yet.
partyPage.overviewSubtitle: Polls per party: current average, trend and highest/lowest values.

comparePage.title: Poll comparison
comparePage.subtitle: Change in the polls compared to an earlier point in time.
comparePage.noData: No surveys available for this comparison period.

report.title: Report a problem
report.intro: Wrong data, a display bug or another tip? Drop us a short note – we'll look into it.
report.messagePlaceholder: What happened? Please be as precise as possible.
report.emailHint: Only for follow-up questions. Not published.
report.success: Thanks! Your report has reached us.
report.error: Sending failed. Please try again later.
